# European Arbitration Chamber (EAC)

> The European Arbitration Chamber is an international non-profit association founded in Belgium in 2008, providing arbitration, mediation, art expertise, and authentication services across Europe and beyond.

The EAC (Chambre Européenne d'Arbitrage / Европейская арбитражная палата) administers international commercial arbitration through its International Commercial Arbitration Court (ICAC), publishes arbitration rules and fee regulations, maintains a council of experienced arbitrators, and offers specialized art appraisal, authentication, and digital art passport services. The site is available in English, French, and Russian — paths are mirrored under `/en`, `/fr`, and `/ru`.

## Pages

- [Home](/en): Overview of EAC's mission, services, and recent news.
- [About EAC](/en/eac/about): History, mission, and structure of the chamber.
- [Council](/en/eac/council): Members of the EAC council.
- [News](/en/eac/news): Latest announcements, events, and publications.
- [Contacts](/en/contacts): Office addresses and contact form.

## Arbitration

- [ICAC](/en/arbitration/icac): International Commercial Arbitration Court.
- [Arbitration Rules](/en/arbitration/rules): Procedural rules (2020 edition).
- [Fee Regulations](/en/arbitration/fees): Schedule of arbitration costs.
- [Cost Calculator](/en/arbitration/calculator): Estimate arbitration fees.
- [Model Arbitration Clause](/en/arbitration/clause): Recommended contract clause.

## Expertise

- [Expertise Fields](/en/expertise/fields): Areas of expert opinion services.
- [ICJE](/en/expertise/icje): International Court of Judicial Expertise.

## Art Expertise

- [Art Appraisal](/en/art-expertise/appraisal): Valuation of artworks.
- [Art Authentication](/en/art-expertise/authentication): Authenticity examination.
- [Art Passport](/en/art-expertise/passport): Digital provenance certificate.
- [Gallery](/en/gallery): Authenticated artworks collection.

## Membership

- [How to Join](/en/membership/how-to-join): Application process and requirements.
- [Membership Benefits](/en/membership/benefits): Advantages of EAC membership.
- [Code of Conduct](/en/membership/code-of-conduct): Ethical standards.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/en/policies/privacy): How personal data is handled.
- [Terms of Service](/en/policies/terms): Site usage terms.
- [Cookies Policy](/en/policies/cookies): Cookie usage details.
- [French version](/fr): Site en français.
- [Russian version](/ru): Сайт на русском.
